title: Short title
doc_html:
CODE TITLE XIV.  RIGHT TO COUNSEL

PART I.  INDIGENT DEFENDER REPRESENTATION

§141.  Short title

This Part may be referred to and cited as the "Louisiana Public Defender Act".

Acts 2007, No. 307, §1; Acts 2008, No. 220, §6, eff. June 14, 2008.
